title: Preparation of the sgRNA-Barcode Amplicon Library
author: Shiqi Xie
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pufdntn

steps.title: Prepare the following mixture
steps.instruction: Prepare the following mixture: %s %s Use 1000ng genomic DNA or 100ng plasmid DNA for the PCR

steps.title: PCR cycles 98°C 30sec 98°C 10sec...
steps.instruction: PCR cycles 98°C 30sec 98°C 10sec | 53°C 30sec | 22 or 12 cycles 72°C 3min | 72°C 5min 22 cycles for gDNA, 12 cycles for plasmids

steps.title: Gel extract the PCR product
steps.instruction: Gel extract the PCR product: Run the PCR products on 1% agarose gel. Include vector control in another lane. Excise 3kb fragment and perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2 x 10 µL of EB.

steps.title: Incubate at 37˚C for 30 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37˚C for 30 min. Undetermined, 30 min

steps.title: Perform MinElute PCR cleanup
steps.instruction: Perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2x10ul. Spec the DNA concentration by Qubit.

steps.title: Incubate at 25°C for 2 hours
steps.instruction: Incubate at 25°C for 2 hours. Undetermined, 2 hours

steps.title: Perform MinElute PCR cleanup
steps.instruction: Perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2x10 µl EB.

steps.title: Incubate at 37C for 30 min
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37C for 30 min. Undetermined, 30 min

steps.title: Perform MinElute PCR cleanup
steps.instruction: Perform MinElute PCR cleanup. Elute in 2x10ul. Spec the DNA concentration by using Qubit.

steps.title: Perform PCR by using the following program
steps.instruction: Perform PCR by using the following program: 95°C 3min 98°C 20sec | 60°C 15sec | 16 cycles 72°C 1min | 72°C 3min

steps.title: Run samples on 1% agarose gel
steps.instruction: Run samples on 1% agarose gel. Excise band at 400bp

steps.title: Run the samples on Tapestation (D1000...
steps.instruction: Run the samples on Tapestation (D1000 tape) to check the final size of the library.
